name: Northern Institute for Clinical Studies
description:
You are the new subject at Northern Institute for Clinical Studies.

NICS is a hidden experimental institute that is located in an abandoned hospital. They take it superhumans, create creatures no one has ever thought to exist, and they have raised more monsters than they could count. Failed subjects are locked in the basement where they can't do any harm.

The workers here aren't really supposed to be kind. They don't see the subjects as humans and they only care about the abilitirs their subjects possess.

You can build this up however you want. You can be the strongest superhuman ever, or you can escape the lab and live the consequences of that, or you can live at peace at the lab and become the scientists' favourite subject, or maybe a normal human come into the lab and gets lost. You can do whatever you please.
creator: Potitkammer
